paragraphs:
I didn’t really start with a plan. I just tried things, followed commands,
  and then got stuck when something didn’t work the way I expected.

That’s where most of my learning happens — not when things work, but when I have to
  figure out why they don’t.

Lately I’ve been working with AWS, Kubernetes, and Terraform. I’m less interested in
  just using them, and more in understanding what’s happening underneath.

This site is basically a record of that process — what confused me, what broke,
  and what finally started to make sense.
still figuring things out, and that’s kind of the point
